column1: 実際にやってみて初めて、その難しさが分かった。

column4: て初めて (only after / not until / for the first time because of)
column6: expressing that a realization, experience, or ability came only after doing something specific; 'not until V did I realize...'
column8: て初めて = X only became possible/known after V; てからようやく = finally after (relieved); てはじめて = same meaning; になって初めて = having become X, only then
